title: Moving around without the mouse
drDigitalIntro:
You can move around using just the keyboard.
• Press Tab to jump to the next button or box.
• Press Shift+Tab to jump back.
• Use the arrow keys to move through text or lists.
drDigitalSuccess: Excellent! You navigated a whole form using only the keyboard — no mouse needed!
drDigitalHint: Click 'Start keyboard navigation', then use Tab to move forward through the fields and buttons, Shift+Tab to go back, and Enter to click a button.
